channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-Coder-V2
item.description: DeepSeek-Coder-V2: Breaking the Barrier of Closed-Source Models in Code Intelligence

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V2
item.description: DeepSeek-V2: A Strong, Economical, and Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Language Model

item.title: ml-tooling/best-of-ml-python
item.description: 🏆 A ranked list of awesome machine learning Python libraries. Updated weekly.

item.title: ombharatiya/FAANG-Coding-Interview-Questions
item.description: A curated List of Coding Questions Asked in FAANG Interviews

item.title: ossu/math
item.description: 🧮 Path to a free self-taught education in Mathematics!

item.title: skills/introduction-to-github
item.description: Get started using GitHub in less than an hour.

item.title: cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
item.description: A curated list of free courses with certifications.

item.title: Archmage83/tvapk
item.description: 收集各大AndroidTV的apk应用，可免费看vip和国外电影电视。如大家有也可以贡献一下。
